cookieConsent.message: We only use strictly-necessary cookies to keep you signed in (refresh token). No analytics or ad cookies.

meta.title: kurl · URL shortener with click analytics
meta.description: Shorten long URLs. Analyze clicks by device, channel, and country.

home.subhead: See who clicked from where — by device, OS, browser, channel, country.
home.anonymousHint: No login required. Stats need login though.
home.loginCta: Sign in to save and analyze <clickStats>click stats</clickStats> for this link.

realtime.title: Real-time analytics
realtime.desc: Hour, day-of-week, device, OS, browser — all aggregated.

geo.title: Country / channel
geo.desc: GeoLite2 IP lookup and referrer classification show traffic origin.

safety.title: Malicious URL block
safety.desc: Safe Browsing prevents misuse for phishing.

home.recentSubhead: Kept on this browser for 24 hours. Sign in to keep them forever.
home.statsSubhead: Total links shortened and clicks tracked so far.
home.featuresSubhead: Hour, country, channel, device — who clicked where, at a glance.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your links and view analytics.
login.devTokenHint: Temporary workaround until OAuth callback redirect is fully wired.
login.securityNote: Tokens are stored in browser local storage. Server verifies with RS256 JWT. Refresh token is held in HttpOnly cookie.
login.anonymousAlt: You can also <shorten>shorten URLs</shorten> without signing in.

dashboard.subtitle: {count} links. Click a short code to see analytics.

dashboard.loginRequiredDesc: My links and click stats are visible only after sign-in.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Create your first short link from home.
dashboard.noResultDesc: Could not find any link matching "{query}".
dashboard.deleteConfirmDesc: Deleted links cannot be recovered. Click stats are also lost.
dashboard.bulkSelectAll: Select all links on this page
dashboard.bulkDeleteConfirmDesc: {count} links and all their click stats will be permanently removed.

bulkImport.title: Bulk import from CSV
bulkImport.description: Header columns: url (required), custom_code, expires_at (ISO-8601). The first row is auto-detected as a header if it matches.
bulkImport.limitHint: Up to 100 rows per upload. You'll get a result CSV after validation.
bulkImport.resultHint: The result CSV includes per-row outcome (short_url or error).

edit.title: Edit link
edit.expiresAt: Expires at (leave blank for no expiry)
edit.invalidUrl: URL must start with http:// or https://.
edit.maliciousUrl: URL flagged as malicious or phishing.

og.description: Override the preview shown when this link is pasted on KakaoTalk, Slack, Twitter, etc. Leave fields blank to use the auto-scraped values from the destination page.

protection.passwordSetHint: Password already set (type a new one to change)
protection.maxViewsInvalid: Max views must be a positive integer.

stats.loginRequiredDesc: Stats are visible to the link owner only.
stats.notFoundDesc: It may have been deleted or never existed.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The address may be wrong, the short link may have expired, or the page may not exist.

recent.title: Recent shortenings
recent.claimCta: Sign up to keep these links permanently in your account.

statsEmpty.title: No clicks yet
statsEmpty.description: Share this short link on KakaoTalk / Slack / social — analytics will start the moment someone clicks.

about.title: kurl — URL shortener with click analytics
about.lead: Shrink long URLs and see who clicks from where. Free, no ads.
about.section1Body: Most shorteners hide analytics behind a paywall. kurl gives you device, OS, browser, channel, country, and hour-of-day breakdowns for free.
about.section2Body: Each visit is filtered for bots and malicious URLs, then redirected. Clicks are denormalized into wide analytic columns so charts load fast even at scale.
about.section3Body: Spring Boot · MySQL · Redis · Next.js 14 · AWS ECS Fargate. Source on GitHub.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.lead: Today: one free plan. Paid tier roadmap below.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.p1: These terms govern your use of kurl. Using the service means you accept them.
terms.p2: kurl is for shortening lawful URLs only. Shortening is rejected or revoked for: malicious/phishing destinations, spam, copyright violations, hate content, doxxing.
terms.p3: Public http/https URLs only. Private IPs, localhost, file:// and similar are blocked.
terms.p4: We screen with Google Safe Browsing plus custom bot heuristics. Abusive accounts may be suspended without notice.
terms.p5: Service provided AS-IS without availability guarantees. Operators are not liable for data loss or downtime.
terms.p6: Terms may change with notice via the "Last updated" timestamp and, where possible, email.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: kurl collects the minimum data needed and anonymizes by default. This policy follows GDPR Article 13 and Korea's PIPA.
privacy.p2: OAuth sign-in: email, provider (Google), signup date. Shortening: original URL, short code, expiry. Clicks: timestamp, User-Agent, Referer, IP with last octet masked, GeoIP-derived country/region/city.
privacy.p3: Service operation (redirect, stats), abuse protection, security incident response. Never sold or used for marketing.
privacy.p4: Anonymous links auto-expire after 24h. Authenticated links persist until you delete. Expired links + their clicks are auto-cleaned 30 days after expiry. Account deletion erases everything immediately.
privacy.p5: Stored IPs are masked (IPv4 last octet / IPv6 beyond first two groups). Raw IPs exist transiently in memory and logs only — never written to the database.
privacy.p6: GDPR Article 17 (erasure) and Article 20 (portability) honored. Settings page exposes data download (JSON) and permanent account deletion.
privacy.p7: Google OAuth (email, name), Google Safe Browsing API (URL hashes for malware checks), MaxMind GeoLite2 (offline GeoIP — no outbound calls).
privacy.p8: One HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite=Strict cookie for the JWT refresh token. No analytics or ad cookies.
privacy.p9: Data inquiries: GitHub issues or the operator's email.

settings.title: Settings
settings.timezoneHint: Used as the report time zone on stats pages.
settings.languageHint: You can also change this from the language switcher in the header.
settings.exportHint: User info + all links + click events (IPs are masked).
settings.deleteHint: Your account enters a 30-day grace period after deletion. Sign back in within that window to restore everything; after 30 days the account and all links/stats are permanently removed. Anonymous links are not affected.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: Sign back in within 30 days to restore. After that this is permanent. Type "DELETE" to confirm.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: Use these from scripts or automations that call the kurl API. The full key is shown once — copy it somewhere safe immediately.
apiKeys.justIssuedHint: You won't be able to see this again. Store it like a password.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoking this key disables it immediately. Continue?

homeFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
homeFaq.a1: Anonymous links auto-expire after 24h. Links you make signed in last until you delete them.
homeFaq.q2: Can I use it without signing in?
homeFaq.a2: Yes — shortening works without an account. Stats and permanent storage need Google sign-in.
homeFaq.a3: On the My Links page click any short code to open the 8-dimension stats page.
homeFaq.q4: Will previews show in KakaoTalk / Slack?
homeFaq.a4: Yes. kurl detects social bot User-Agents and serves an OG-tagged HTML page instead of a redirect, so previews render correctly.
homeFaq.a5: We screen with Google Safe Browsing at shorten time. Flagged URLs are rejected.
homeFaq.a6: Yes — shortening is one POST to /api/v1/links. For authenticated endpoints, issue a key under Settings > API keys. (The full OpenAPI doc is gated to operators.)
